context_text: <A> yeah i don't know how much my son makes cause he's never told me and i've never asked he is the communication systems um coordinator for the country music association / <B> uh-huh / <A> yeah and he just really got lucky to get the job i well i say lucky he'd had some talent / <B> yeah / <A> but when he graduated from college he had two opportunities and he wanted to take one of them / <B> uh-huh / <A> that wasn't his it was a mm a kind of a more negative experience / <B> yeah
